speaker: Argo
text: Hello, Professor Celio! 🐾

speaker: Celio
text: Hello, Argo.

speaker: Argo
text: Sorry for asking to go to your room so suddenly… *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: No, no, it's fine. Part of a professor’s job is to take care of the students.

speaker: Argo
text: (Professor Derich said something similar…)

speaker: Argo
text: You sure do have a lot of stuff in here.

speaker: Celio
text: I do, don’t I? I enjoy the liveness of it. *sigh*

speaker: Professor Derich
text: was right about the contents of his room.

speaker: Unknown
text: *The shelves are full of things like difficult-looking books and lecture reference materials, not to mention several novels.*
On top of the shelves are mysterious objects and things I could never even begin to imagine what they’re used for. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I was expecting all the books, but... what is... that?
I choose one of the strange items at random and ask him about it. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: What are you looking at? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? Oh, uh... is that... a mirror? Some of it looks cheaply made, though...

speaker: Celio
text: Hmhm, I suppose you could say that.
Argosigh…*A faint scent of lavender fills the air.*

speaker: Argo
text: I’m not sure what to make of all this. I imagined you being the kind of person who likes to keep things organized.

speaker: Celio
text: Are you surprised to find my room in such a state? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Well... Yeah...

speaker: Argo
text: Can I ask why you have them, then? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Hmm... I’m afraid that’s a secret. *

speaker: Argo
text: I see...

speaker: Argo
text: (Why is it that when I look at all this junk… I get some kind of strange feeling…? )

speaker: Argo
text: (But... I can’t quite put my finger on what that feeling exactly is...)

speaker: Argo
text: About the cards...

speaker: Celio
text: What is it? Have you discovered something new about them?

speaker: Argo
text: No, I was just wondering… Is it okay to be using them all the time?

speaker: Celio
text: Ah. Naturally, you will get tired if you use them too much. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Just tired? Nothing else? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: That’s right. Under normal circumstances, exhausting your power won't kill you. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (Normal circumstances…?)

speaker: Argo
text: What should I do when I get tired? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: A good night's rest will do the trick, just like with physical strength. *

speaker: Argo
text: Well that’s simple enough. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: But if you rely on them too much, you may not be able to use them when they’re needed the most. You must be very careful. *

speaker: Argo
text: I will.

speaker: Argo
text: What do you think of Julius? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Hmm... I get the feeling he could be trouble. *suspicious glance*

speaker: Argo
text: Trouble...? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: He has a firm ideal in his mind of how to be a knight...

speaker: Argo
text: I thought that too, but what’s so bad about that? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: When he sees the side of knights that opposes his ideal, I’m afraid he’s going to be quite disappointed.

speaker: Argo
text: Are you saying... there's a darker side to being a knight? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Well... As president of the Knights College, there’s not much I can say on the matter…

speaker: Celio
text: However, nothing is perfect. Knights are no exception, Argo. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: If you hold too tightly to that ideal image, there are heavy repercussions when it is shattered... It can be okay in moderation, but I’m a bit worried about Julius.

speaker: Argo
text: "I’ve been waiting for you." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: That said! He is an excellent candidate to become a knight. His strength is unparalleled, especially in combat.

speaker: Celio
text: Knights often put themselves in dangerous situations, and you wouldn’t want to be weak then, right? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Ugh...But I'm... not the greatest fighter... *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Neither am I. But that’s okay, we’re all needed somewhere. I mean, look at me. I'm the president of a college.

speaker: Argo
text: I feel better hearing that from you. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (A place where I’m needed…? Maybe the cards will help me find that…)

speaker: Argo
text: If you’ll excuse me, I should be leaving soon. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Good bye, Argo.
